mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_favorite (user_id, problem_id, create_time) VALUES (#{userId}, #{problemId}, NOW())
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM user_favorite WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND problem_id = #{problemId}
mapper.select: SELECT problem_id FROM user_favorite WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT uf.problem_id FROM user_favorite uf INNER JOIN problem p ON uf.problem_id = p.id WHERE uf.user_id = #{userId} AND p.status = 1 ORDER BY uf.create_time DESC
SELECT FROM user_favorite WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user_favorite uf INNER JOIN problem p ON uf.problem_id = p.id WHERE uf.user_id = #{userId} AND p.status = 1

SELECT p.id, p.title, p.category_id as categoryId, p.difficulty, COUNT(uf.user_id) as favoriteCount FROM user_favorite uf INNER JOIN problem p ON uf.problem_id = p.id WHERE p.status = 1 GROUP BY p.id, p.title, p.category_id, p.difficulty ORDER BY favoriteCount DESC LIMIT #{limit}
